full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #47 (2026-05-30)

PULSE
Health: 0.5907 (C). 1026 wallets, 285 contributors. 55 memos today vs 88 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
56 reward payments, 370519 PFT distributed to 18 contributors. Top earner: rhwiJx...2TaE (82000 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 3,000 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (3,000 PFT). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (25,200 PFT, avg 5,040/day over 5 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (66 memos). Fastest new contributor: r33kyx...3vFC (12.0 memos/day in 1 days). 17 new wallet(s) this week. 52 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 71.4%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-30): 186 transactions from 30 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
